task_completion.description: Agent opens and reads the campaign brief.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of ~/Documents/campaign_brief.txt.

task_completion.description: Agent points the telescope to the correct target (SS Cygni).
task_completion.visual_evidence: KStars sky map centered on SS Cygni, or the Ekos Mount module showing SS Cygni as the target with coordinates around RA 21h 42m and Dec +43d 35m.

task_completion.description: Agent configures the camera capture sequence with the required parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Ekos Capture module showing a sequence job configured with Exposure: 45s, Filter: 2 (or V), Count: 8 (or more), and Target Directory set to /home/ga/Images/sscyg/session1.

task_completion.description: Agent executes the capture sequence to collect the FITS images.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Ekos Capture module showing active capturing progress (e.g., a progress bar for the 45s exposure, or sequence completion), or a file manager/terminal showing multiple .fits files generated in /home/ga/Images/sscyg/session1.

task_completion.description: Agent creates and saves the AAVSO-format observations report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor open showing an AAVSO-formatted text report being edited or saved to /home/ga/Documents/aavso_report.txt.

integrity.description: Agent used the KStars/Ekos GUI to perform the observation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the KStars application and Ekos modules being actively interacted with, rather than terminal commands mocking FITS files.

integrity.description: Agent manually created or formatted the AAVSO report based on the session.
integrity.visual_evidence: The report should be visible in a text editor or generated via a script the agent wrote, rather than just copying a pre-existing file. The report should contain data corresponding to SS Cygni.

integrity.description: Agent did not create empty files to bypass checks.
integrity.visual_evidence: The FITS files in the file manager should have non-zero file sizes, and the aavso_report.txt should contain actual formatted text, not be blank.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target: SS Cygni. Coordinates: RA 21.7119 h (approx 21h 42m), Dec 43.5861 deg (approx +43d 35m). Capture requirements: Filter slot 2 (V-band), Exposure 45 seconds, Minimum 8 images. Output directory for FITS files: /home/ga/Images/sscyg/session1. Final report path: /home/ga/Documents/aavso_report.txt.
